arts.ttl: Mark Robins makes two changes to his Coventry City team to face QPR at Loftus Road
arts.sum: City: Oliver Dovin; Joel Latibeaudiere, Bobby Thomas, Luis Binks, Milan van Ewijk: Josh Eccles, Ben Sheaf; Jay Dasilva, Jack Rudoni; Brandon Thomas-Asante, Haji Wright. Jack Rudoni completes the midfield three, while the two changes come up top where Haji Wright and Brandon Thomas-Asante come in as a straight replacement for Ellis Simms and Norman Bassette.

arts.ttl: QPR v Coventry line-ups: Varane, Clarke-Salter, Smyth and Celar start for Rangers
arts.sum: QPR v Coventry. The post QPR v Coventry line-ups: Varane, Clarke-Salter, Smyth and Celar start for Rangers appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: QPR v Coventry City live build-up, team news and updates from Loftus Road
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. The Sky Blues have managed just two Championship wins from their opening ten games so far, while the Hoops have fared slightly worse with just one.

arts.ttl: the problem or the solution to Coventry City's woes
arts.sum: Coventry City go to Queen's Park Rangers tonight (8pm kick-off) as both sides look to end a troubled run - and CoventryLive readers in our comments section want to see improvements in one key part of the pitch by the Sky Blues. Readers think more could be done to provide good service up front, particularly to Ellis Simms, who ended last season with 13 goals.

arts.ttl: Chair benched: QPR team news and predicted XI to face Coventry City
arts.sum: The latest QPR team news as Marti Cifuentes' side gear up to face Coventry City in the Championship. The post Chair benched: QPR team news and predicted XI to face Coventry City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Opposition injury news as former Coventry City loan man a doubt for QPR
arts.sum: Former Coventry City loan man Jake Clarke-Salter is a doubt for QPR ahead of tonight’s Championship clash at Loftus Road. The 34-year-old underwent surgery on a knee problem and will need ‘a few weeks’ to recover.

arts.ttl: Marti Cifuentes makes big admission after QPR slip to bottom spot ahead of Coventry City visit
arts.sum: “Either we accept where we are, work harder and accept criticism – because that’s the nature of football – and accept that we need to get better, or we just start to point fingers and then it gets more difficult. “We need to improve very quickly but I believe it will get better.”

arts.ttl: Formation conundrum and forward changes as Coventry City result needed at QPR - Andy Turner
arts.sum: Predicted starting City team against QPR (3-4-1-2): Oliver Dovin; Bobby Thomas, Joel Latibeaudiere, Luis Binks; Milan van Ewijk, Josh Eccles, Ben Sheaf, Jay Dasilva; Jack Rudoni; Brandon Thomas-Asante, Haji Wright. But working on the basis of an expected improvement from the talented pair, there’s a strong argument for giving the formation another go in the hope of keeping things tight, first and foremost, and then throwing on a bit more fire power in the second half.

arts.ttl: Cifuentes says he has ‘full support’ of QPR hierarchy
arts.sum: QPR news. The post Cifuentes says he has ‘full support’ of QPR hierarchy appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: ‘Took it as a compliment’ - Paul Heckingbottom identifies Coventry City game plan that 'suited' him - CoventryLive
arts.sum: The Sky Blues manager switched to a back three with wing-backs for Saturday’s trip to Lancashire and Heckingbottom admitted he knew what was coming in the second half when the visitors threw on more attacking players - Brandon Thomas-Asante, Haji Wright and Tatsuhiro Sakamoto - from the bench. Preston North End boss Paul Heckingbottom says he took it as a “compliment” that his opposite number at Coventry City changed his formation at Deepdale.
